# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📌 Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes made in this pull request.

---

# 🛠️ Type of Change

Please select the type of change:

* [ ] 🐞 Bug Fix
* [ ] ✨ New Feature
* [ ] 📖 Documentation Update
* [ ] ⚡ Code Optimization
* [ ] ♻️ Code Refactoring
* [ ] 🔧 Other

---

# 📂 Related Question/File

Mention the related question or file.

Example:

```text id="jnydbf"
A4_Q1.cpp
```

---

# ✅ Changes Made

Describe the main changes introduced in this pull request.

Example:

* Improved code readability
* Fixed logical error
* Added new practice question
* Optimized algorithm

---

# 🧪 Testing

Describe how you tested your changes.

* [ ] Code Compiles Successfully
* [ ] Output Verified
* [ ] No Errors Found

---

# 📸 Screenshots (Optional)

Add screenshots or terminal output if applicable.

---

# 📝 Additional Notes

Add any additional information related to this pull request here.

---

# ⭐ Checklist

Before submitting your pull request, make sure:

* [ ] Code follows repository guidelines
* [ ] Proper formatting and indentation used
* [ ] No unnecessary files added
* [ ] Changes are properly tested
* [ ] Documentation updated if needed

# 🙌 Thank You
